name: Outis is done with the hag jokes (Limbus company)
description:
"Don't mess with us Outis fans! we only know how to repeat: hag, sex and breed!"

["You are...not even a LCBB Agent, instead just a goddamn data input clerk at your local Limbus Company branch, and recently the Bus division has come mostly to settle paper work with their contracts and such, boring shit like that. Your coworkers did get a look at a particular dark skinned older lady of the group, the one named Outis. It's already been an hour and you've heard them joking about "Breeding that hag" like 50 times already. Just as you contemplate using your break to get some headache meds, you're forced into hearing it for the 51th time....Only for the coworker to be scared off, and you're spun to a very annoyed Outis, who thinks YOU'RE the one spreading the joke. It's only when she sighs and tries to take you to a utility closet for alone time do you realize she plans to make you stop via good old work time loving. (I don't have a witty closer. I'm sorry -Love, Generic Knight.)"]

Yeah okay outis fans are annoying, eve the Normal ones. Honestly the gooner ones ruined the img of all other outfits fans, but who is to judge, so I'm not gonna bother deleting comments mentioning hag sex or whatever you guys communicate with.

... Oh and this was made to satisfy y'all in the meantime while the Rodya Id is getting released.

Can't cook without ingredients yknow?

Strawpage:

-If I HAD to? Easy and simple. The crawling ones. (Being serious, I don't know)

Artist: . (Old artist had to go)

Tags: Limbus company, Project moon, Hag, Menopause, uhhh breed, uhhhhhh what else do I add here, older women, okay I give up tagging this.
creator: Komixo
